brief: Escalating Middle East tensions and Canadian wildfires dominate headlines, while UK and Ukraine see political shake-ups. Research explores AI adoption in public agencies and health misinformation in low-resource languages.
news_summary: Canadian wildfires worsen US air quality as Trump meets new senator; Gaza recovery plan scaled down; Ukraine defense minister's ousting sparks protests. Hong Kong raids independent bookstores, and diesel prices hit $5 amid Gulf tensions.
papers_summary: Studies examine generative AI adoption in state transportation agencies and health misinformation detection in Bangla. Other research maps academic networking in precarious transitions and bots in open-source projects.

en.brief: Escalating Middle East tensions and Canadian wildfires dominate headlines, while UK and Ukraine see political shake-ups. Research explores AI adoption in public agencies and health misinformation in low-resource languages.
en.news_summary: Canadian wildfires worsen US air quality as Trump meets new senator; Gaza recovery plan scaled down; Ukraine defense minister's ousting sparks protests. Hong Kong raids independent bookstores, and diesel prices hit $5 amid Gulf tensions.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine generative AI adoption in state transportation agencies and health misinformation detection in Bangla. Other research maps academic networking in precarious transitions and bots in open-source projects.

zh.brief: 今日全球新闻涵盖中国国际形象提升、霍尔木兹海峡替代路线争议、泰国曼谷酒吧大火反思、香港国安法再引关注等热点。学术研究关注生成式AI采用、开源社区机器人协作及低资源语言健康信息鉴别。
zh.news_summary: 皮尤调查显示全球对华好感首次超越美国；曼谷酒吧大火暴露泰国法规漏洞；香港国安搜查独立书店引争议。此外，乌克兰国防部长被撤职引发抗议，加拿大野火影响美国空气质量。
zh.papers_summary: 研究指出生成式AI在政府部门的采纳面临期望调整挑战；一项论文提出基于谓词逻辑的多变量图可视化分析工具ZipLine。

todays_image.caption: The brown algae *Lobophora* sp. creates floating mats that disrupt ecosystems, much like Trump's meeting with Darline Graham might stir political currents in the White House.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
